top_signals.title: Private Credit Faces ‘Pipeline of Defaults,’ Holly Kim Says
top_signals.summary: Glendon Capital co-founder Holly Kim explains why the private credit industry stands to see a big “backlog of defaults” away from any economic dislocations or any other inflation-related economic inputs. She speaks at the Bloomberg Global Credit Forum in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Potential liquidity or banking-system instability affecting financial conditions.

top_signals.title: China’s Chery poised to strike deal with Nissan to build cars at Sunderland plant
top_signals.summary: Chery is on the cusp of building its first manufacturing presence in the UK in the latest sign of Chinese carmakers gaining a major foothold in Britain’s electric vehicle market. The Omoda and Jaecoo owner, which is the third largest carmaker in China, has unveiled a non-binding memorandum of understanding (MoU) with Nissan to explore [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
